## IPO Plans and Leadership Tensions

citations.cited_text: OpenAI's IPO could land as soon as the fourth quarter of this year, according to a person familiar with the matter.
citations.title: OpenAI preps for IPO in 2026, says ChatGPT must be 'productivity tool'

. However, there appears to be internal disagreement about the timing.
